name: Merge Party
author: Poki
description: Merge Party is an engaging merge game that sparks a celebration by merging various animal Ogos! To keep the party fun, simply click on two identical Ogos to merge them and unlock upgraded Ogos! Each click on an Ogo earns you money which you can use to buy more Ogo eggs to hatch diverse animal Ogos. Beginning with a Dogogo, can you gather all the Ogos and host a wonderful party? How to play Merge Party? Select and click on two identical Ogo to merge them. Click on the coins to collect them. Who created Merge Party? Merge Party is created by Kelly Ray J. Play their other games on Poki : Chicken Sword: Ninja Master , RoyaleBall.io , Space Ballz and Hole N' Fun ! How can I play Merge Party for free? You can play Merge Party for free on Poki. Can I play Merge Party on mobile devices and desktop? Merge Party can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
